name: Quick Pita Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh basil leaves, stacked, rolled up, cut in thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
2. Place the pita pockets on a large baking sheet.
3. Divide the shredded mozzarella cheese and dried oregano evenly among each pita pocket.
4. Bake for about 10 minutes, or until the cheese is bubbly.
5. In a separate bowl, toss olive oil and black pepper with diced tomatoes.
6. Serve the tomatoes alongside the basil strips in their own bowls.
7. Spoon the tomato mixture onto the hot pita pockets.
8. Serves 6.
